transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Hi, thanks for your message. Are you working at the moment and when would you be looking to move?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m currently a university lecturer based in Nottingham and looking to move as soon as possible. Would it be possible to arrange a viewing sometime this week?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Thanks. I still need to know your work situation and move date before sharing contact details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a full-time university lecturer, so my work is stable. I’m hoping to move within the next couple of weeks. Would it be possible to arrange a viewing this week to discuss further?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Thanks. I still need to know your work situation and move date before sharing contact details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I mentioned I’m a full-time university lecturer with a stable position, and I’m aiming to move within the next two weeks. Could we arrange a viewing this week to discuss everything in person?

transcript.speaker: actor
